status: height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 28px 0 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary);
nav-row: padding: 4px 16px 12px; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between;
scroll-body: flex: 1; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; position: relative;
shelf: display: flex; gap: 10px; padding: 0 16px 14px; overflow-x: auto; scrollbar-width: none;
rcard: width: 116px; flex-shrink: 0; border: 1px solid var(--divider); border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px; background: var(--canvas);
rcard-thumb: width: 100%; height: 70px; border-radius: 4px; background: var(--surface); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 8px;
rcard-name: font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary); line-height: 1.25; margin-bottom: 2px;
frow: display: flex; align-items: center; height: 60px; padding: 0 16px; gap: 12px;
ficon: width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
fcheck: width: 40px; height: 40px; flex-shrink: 0; color: var(--blue); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
fname: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
upload-top: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 6px;
upload-label: font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
upload-track: height: 3px; border-radius: 2px; background: var(--divider); overflow: hidden;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; gap: 4px; letter-spacing: 0.2px;
